channel.title: WorldBuilder
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates

item.title: WorldBuilder 0.1.0+275
item.description:
## Changes
- monster editor improvements ([92fafff](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/92fafffc74d34e1aa42b00b5a13a1cae44207e1c)) - fix buildings - again... add new monster builder *thx Derpy for how to do it so could make easier - random stuff people can find ([239c0c1](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/239c0c13955e7439ddcb2beb93b19734ab478b3d)) - Dungeon editor: per-static scale, surface alignment, hover/placement indicators, and incremental static transform updates ([33709a5](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/33709a57ca905bceb9e969545e960d878afb8520)) - World gen: coastal water bands, building/road tweaks; Fresh Start resets landblocks/dungeons; DAT export skips bad entries ([39d68d7](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/39d68d7cf6601d0d17c66a2ce4e704d9941aa533)) - fix(landscape): skip redundant terrain apply after brush preview; fix command doc IDs ([5f963ee](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/5f963eec4828394260c8f99b3bf243787a64b362)) - gizmo improvement ([44f47f8](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/44f47f8f2f76200e7b00f853680acf490368bf87)) - Weenie property enums and DID/int pickers; expand templates and wire dungeon/landscape browsers ([4dc3983](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/4dc398320f7fb639450f2e19dc857916de1a0a35)) - fix dungeon export crash on corrupt setup entries in dat ([ee39f71](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/ee39f71421fc59260bad4138068b70bffc96d38b)) - Surface browser paging and dungeon scan fixes; terrain split matches client; clear dungeon docks ([fa7c58c](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/fa7c58c51c9098f3fdf94c9f89692a46e08998c7)) - weenie editor, layout editor overhaul, transform gizmo, world gen, mesh import/export, texture import import improvements ([f26345e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/f26345e552c360f0f93f9bf348d5acc06c3fd5fb)) - landscape refactor, dungeon scene and settings updates ([0998c38](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/0998c38af47842b7ce7787694850d783c526b818)) - world mini map fix, remove templates, some performance stuff ([6a317bc](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/6a317bc45656063f918a7cde65f198a5772df93a)) - dungeon 'world template' WIP ([cd3e377](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/cd3e3775748e44205632449e1b6e96531775b997)) - mini map for terrain editor ([7293629](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/7293629dc2678a926b2f6f6113ed89029b28a544)) - Dungeon editor improvements: autofurnish, portal cache, undo fix, cell reclaim, UX ([9a0dbc3](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/9a0dbc39f95ac84f0c27a7657425432c04e9ca8c)) - fix fill tool preview ([f29948e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/f29948ee1f8496447b1c4936a9b2bd88435b4d4a)) - Changelog from commit messages; add release.yml ([af985b2](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/af985b28bd3dd9f0fd147ca66fdcc7147e80dedd)) - make dungeon view fill ([b9ffe3e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/b9ffe3eb5a64643dc78da86b7453378b54c88ac5)) - more fixes ([b671cee](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/b671ceec43e217d57eca58d1f2b5b0151841a3e8)) - Merge PR #12: Maximize editor window ([ac4177e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/ac4177e4f0f7bd61f7ba35d9f170e1ecfe5c1dac)) - Merge PR #11: Fix LayoutDesc position and child nodes ([b8d228e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/b8d228ec144b796c43f0906938c1947cbc05af1d)) - fix EnvCell log spam: deduplicate retry preparation, demote verbose logging to Debug ([75fb32e](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/75fb32eec78eae0cfcac5c2e8475504f39321da9)) - add ACE DB instance placements: weenie picker, dungeon/landscape placement panels, DB import with position fix ([d512ef2](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/d512ef21396f437684992e93a219390114aff78e)) - dungeon gen v3: branching/size controls, AABB overlap, yaw snap; portal capping system; export pipeline fixes (portal ordering, OtherPortalId rewrite, visibility stabs); KB v14 with dead-end index and style themes ([0aec0dc](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/0aec0dcfd88fd807a75bc2294a0e29535750bb5b)) - Maximize editor window ([e619002](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/e619002c71b8e334eb9c1fff8756549ccb69bf74)) - Fix LayoutDesc position and child nodes ([a858af7](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/a858af70a0766a511a2d0ecd91f48d8896443f0a)) - change camera down to c ([8847c28](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/8847c2852d0fabbf22dfa376d1ed2fc29db02a3b)) - fix dungeon generator(NOT COMPLETE,WORKS ALOT BETTER BUT NOT 'DONE'): portal alignment, yaw-only orientation, capping, and portal flags ([ff36b20](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/ff36b20b109b590d9a5d10d139612a30df8b794f)) - grid and recenter view for dungeon editor ([675fb1d](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/675fb1d97278766620b3f4f181130d19c12d9d58)) - fix dungeon dock crash ([40e9567](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/40e956764d24572abca15bd56cce5ce91ee2a660)) - add history to dungeon editor ([c66b13f](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/c66b13fe16451da5372def0de6c33635249e5599)) - feat: heightmap import, export progress + static repositioning, bulk terrain/ACE DB and history tweaks ([5faec77](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/5faec770aba1e9f97422f6161e532530b9a25d23)) - Dungeon generator v2: favorites-driven generation, room furnishing, and selection visualization ([f45e230](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/f45e2306a637b9fcc14f1e83ec2b18c4be01d944)) - add sql connector to export, or direct change DB to move objects up or down if height change done in overworld ([67912c1](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/67912c1c7a27892e8a017f9533e07daffa4b6be5)) - More prefab stuff, work on generator for dungeons, added favorites, cell/room ([7b89961](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/7b89961774b4a25af3d28bd92d57443be92aa44d)) - more prefab stuff ([da88e74](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/da88e741a0e5c0555af1c1746dea64413db7472a)) - Dungeon editor refactor, landscape shader fix, document save/settings bug fixes ([b8a09dd](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/b8a09dd989f0ad0abe75930c692683ae61a38b6d)) - improve dungeon editor render loop ([d7d0205](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/d7d020520afc41908a2ba3beeaa38d9227c2a0d6)) - more performance stuff ([8a478a8](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/8a478a8a97756d643dfebcfc5b716ab657d15a7b)) - things go smoother ([989ae26](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/989ae2638f7b2ff7976b177111642474dc6af245)) - fix tools/terrain not leveling/coming with objects ([4e8790c](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/4e8790c628972b86321caf4805e4f69d981d70d9)) - some dungeon stuff (not done) and bug fix for doc saving ([b3c28ed](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/b3c28ed0e779022722bc2ebf56c3f1b9720809d7)) - fix save process of portal ([ec51ebc](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/ec51ebcbeee59f7b3b1a757f582c8cbc5579bae1)) - Trigger Build Edge ([3438f4d](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/3438f4d99a5a5be8b0b5ec73653d53f7d08258fb)) - readme ([57a902c](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/57a902c35b6ddc7218babd7e2bc1d196851f1758)) - Release setup: ACME-WorldBuilderInstall.exe, logo, work flows ([8b40a7d](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/8b40a7d4f948eee779635b7cd3ebed1a03135480)) - Update README with all current features and beta disclaimer ([e593725](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/e593725dcb01ec1d0e180f54d6c316aa4babb27d)) - Add demo recording system for promo videos ([984adef](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/984adef09d8afe71171f67ffc9e670635599372d)) - Add spell, skill, vital, experience, chargen, spellset, and layout editors ([71a37e7](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/71a37e76ec3b24fda848f775cd24ae5fb0e49946)) - Upgrade DatReaderWriter to 2.1.2, fix portal rendering pipeline and texture export ([c96fff1](https://github.com/Vanquish-6/WorldBuilder-ACME-Edition/commit/c96fff135184c3013d7e86432d88f5666b3982f0))
